description: Service Provider shall maintain Commercial General Liability insurance with limits of not less than $5,000,000 per occurrence and $10,000,000 in the aggregate throughout the term of this Agreement.
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider shall maintain Commercial General Liability insurance with limits of not less than $5,000,000 per occurrence and $10,000,000 in the aggregate.

description: Certificates of insurance must be provided to Client within 10 business days of each policy renewal.
verbatim_snippet: Certificates of insurance shall be provided to Client within 10 business days of policy renewal.

description: Service Provider shall maintain Professional Liability (Errors & Omissions) insurance with limits of not less than $2,000,000 per claim.
penalty: Right to suspend services until coverage confirmed
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider shall maintain Professional Liability insurance with limits of not less than $2,000,000 per claim.

description: Service Provider shall deliver monthly performance reports to Client no later than the 5th business day of each calendar month, including KPIs, incident summaries, and SLA compliance metrics.
penalty: $500 per day of delay, up to $5,000 per month
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider shall deliver monthly performance reports to Client no later than the 5th business day of each calendar month.

description: Service Provider shall provide quarterly executive summary reports within 15 business days after each calendar quarter end.
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider shall provide quarterly executive summary reports within 15 business days after each calendar quarter end.

description: Each party must keep all Confidential Information received from the other party strictly confidential and use it solely for the purposes of this Agreement.
verbatim_snippet: Each party agrees to keep confidential all Confidential Information received from the other party and to use such information solely for the purposes of this Agreement.

description: Confidentiality obligations survive termination of the Agreement for a period of three (3) years.
verbatim_snippet: Confidentiality obligations survive termination of this Agreement for a period of three (3) years.

description: Either party must provide 90 days written notice prior to the end of the initial term or any renewal term to prevent automatic renewal.
penalty: Agreement auto-renews for successive one-year periods if notice not given
verbatim_snippet: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon 90 days written notice prior to the end of the initial term or any renewal term.

description: Service Provider guarantees 99.5% system uptime measured monthly. Downtime exceeding the threshold triggers service credits: 0.5%-1.0% breach = 5% monthly fee credit; >1.0% breach = 10% monthly fee credit.
penalty: 5% or 10% monthly fee credit depending on breach severity
verbatim_snippet: Provider guarantees 99.5% system uptime measured monthly. Downtime exceeding the guaranteed threshold shall trigger service credits.

description: Client must submit SLA credit requests within 30 days of the affected month to be eligible for service credits.
penalty: Credit forfeited if not claimed within 30 days
verbatim_snippet: Client must submit credit requests within 30 days of the affected month.

description: Service Provider must respond to Priority 1 (critical) incidents within 15 minutes and resolve within 4 hours.
penalty: $2,500 per hour beyond the 4-hour resolution window
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider must respond to Priority 1 incidents within 15 minutes and resolve within 4 hours of initial report.

description: Client shall pay all undisputed invoices within 30 days of receipt. Late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month.
penalty: 1.5% per month interest on overdue amounts
verbatim_snippet: Client shall pay all undisputed invoices within 30 days of receipt. Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

description: Client must dispute any invoice in writing within 15 days of receipt, specifying the disputed amount and basis for dispute.
penalty: Invoice deemed accepted if not disputed within 15 days
verbatim_snippet: Client must dispute any invoice in writing within 15 days of receipt, specifying the disputed amount and the basis for the dispute.

description: Service Provider shall provide annual fee reconciliation reports within 45 days of each contract year end, detailing all charges, credits, and adjustments.
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider shall provide annual fee reconciliation reports within 45 days of each contract year end.

description: Service Provider must maintain compliance with all applicable data protection regulations including GDPR, CCPA, and any jurisdiction-specific requirements throughout the term.
penalty: Indemnification for regulatory fines and penalties arising from non-compliance
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider must maintain compliance with all applicable data protection regulations including GDPR and CCPA throughout the term.

description: Service Provider shall conduct annual security audits and provide audit reports to Client within 30 days of completion.
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider shall conduct annual security audits and provide audit reports to Client within 30 days of completion.

description: Either party must provide written notice of any material breach within 10 business days of discovery, specifying the nature of the breach and remediation requested.
penalty: Failure to notify may limit available remedies
verbatim_snippet: Either party must provide written notice of any material breach within 10 business days of discovery.

description: All formal notices under this Agreement must be delivered by certified mail or overnight courier to the addresses specified in Schedule D, with copies to legal counsel.
verbatim_snippet: All formal notices under this Agreement must be delivered by certified mail or overnight courier to the addresses specified in Schedule D.

description: Service Provider shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Client from any third-party claims arising from Service Provider's negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of this Agreement.
penalty: Full indemnification including legal fees and court costs
verbatim_snippet: Service Provider shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Client from any third-party claims arising from Service Provider's negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of this Agreement.

description: Upon termination for cause, Service Provider must return or destroy all Client Confidential Information within 30 days and provide written certification of destruction.
penalty: $50,000 liquidated damages for failure to certify destruction
verbatim_snippet: Upon termination for cause, Service Provider must return or destroy all Client Confidential Information within 30 days and provide written certification of destruction.
